home.heroSubtitle: KidsCode trains your child's logic through fun mini-games — sequencing, patterns, loops, bug hunting — and finishes with real code. No reading walls of text, just playing and thinking.
home.feature1Text: Kids sharpen programmer thinking with puzzles and robot games — typing real code comes as the grand finale.
home.feature2Text: Bite-sized levels build up logic skills step by step, with XP and ranks from Curious Egg to True Programmer.
home.feature3Text: Every game reacts right away. Learning by doing, not just watching.
home.pathTitle: The journey to becoming a programmer
home.pathSubtitle: Step by step, level by level. Each level unlocks new powers!

learn.title: Your learning path
learn.subtitle: Complete games to earn XP and level up!
learn.allDone: You finished EVERYTHING — a true programmer!
learn.resetConfirm: Tap again to erase all progress

lesson.outputEmpty: Press Run to see what your code does!
lesson.tryAgain: Not quite — check the mission and try again. You can do it!

game.tryAgain: Not quite — try again. You can do it!
game.crash: Bonk! Robo got lost. Try a different plan!
game.miss: Robo stopped, but not on the star. Try again!
game.emptyProgram: Tap the blocks below to build your plan
game.findBug: Tap the step that is wrong!
game.pickFix: You found the bug! Now pick the fix.
game.notTheBug: That step is fine — the bug is hiding somewhere else!

profile.signInText: Sign in with Google to save your progress and XP across devices.

footer.tagline: Raising the next generation of programmers, one game at a time.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to KidsCode. By creating an account or using our app, you agree to these Terms & Conditions.

sections.heading: 1. About KidsCode
body: KidsCode is an educational web app that teaches children programming concepts through mini-games, available in English and Bahasa Indonesia.

sections.heading: 2. Accounts
body: You may sign in with a Google account to save your progress. Parents or guardians are responsible for accounts used by children and should supervise their use.
Keep your login credentials secure. You are responsible for activity on your account.

sections.heading: 3. Free access
body: Every world, level, and game in KidsCode is free. There are no passes, subscriptions, or in-app purchases.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable use
body: Use KidsCode only for learning. Do not attempt to disrupt, reverse-engineer, or gain unauthorized access to the service or other users' accounts.

sections.heading: 5. Content ownership
body: All lessons, games, and materials are owned by KidsCode and provided for personal, non-commercial educational use.

sections.heading: 6. Changes to these terms
body: We may update these terms as the service evolves. Continued use after an update means you accept the revised terms.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
body: Questions about these terms? Email us at support@kidscode.app.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what we collect and how we use it. We are committed to protecting the privacy of children and families.

sections.heading: 1. What we collect
body: When you sign in with Google, we store your name, email, and profile photo to create your account. We also save your game progress.

sections.heading: 2. Anonymous play
body: You can play without an account. That progress is stored only in your browser and is not sent to us until you sign in.

sections.heading: 3. How we use your data
body: We use your data to save your game progress and sync it across your devices. We do not sell your personal data.

sections.heading: 4. Children's privacy
body: KidsCode is designed for children with parental involvement. We collect the minimum data needed to run the service. Parents may request access to or deletion of their child's data at any time.

sections.heading: 5. Data retention
body: We keep your account and progress data until you request its deletion.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
body: To access or delete your data, email support@kidscode.app.
